_note: Expected decoded values for committed single-cat fixtures. LZ4 TRUTH (01-05): each compact cats.data blob is [u32 decompressedSize][u32 5090 build][LZ4 block]. decodeCat decompresses (vendor/lz4.js) then reads 7 core stats + the appearance record (pattern/coatPalette/classPalette + 14 part-frames). APPEARANCE LOCATOR FIX (01-06): the RO base locator formerly let a NaN coat-scale pass its range gate and counted zero part-regions, mislocating every 'Colorless' cat ~12 bytes late (garik/churrito/save_file_cat all read a phantom base). The corrected locator requires a FINITE scale and >=3 part records whose 2nd u32 == the pattern value, raising correct base-location from ~694 to 1311/1316 corpus cats. The goldens below are the CORRECTED decoder's exact output on the committed .bin (self-consistent: coatPalette in [1,49], L/R slots symmetric); reinaldo (already correctly located) is unchanged. FIELD MODEL (01-06 coat spike): pattern (f4, 1..706) = fur TEXTURE id, NOT color; coatPalette (f8, 1..49) = the REAL fur COLOR = a direct palette.png row; classPalette (f12, 50..68, or -1=none) = class accent color. hp/mp/level: hp is read only when it validates 1..999 (the u32 after the Cp status string was ~2.0 for every fixture, so it stays null); mp/level unlocated -> null. Never a fabricated value. NEVER commit a .sav — reinaldo.bin is a single-cat blob extracted READ-ONLY from steamcampaign02.sav (build 5090).

garik.bin.name: Garik
garik.bin.note: Colorless cat (classPalette -1 = none). Corrected locator: coatPalette 18 (silver), pattern 141, symmetric slots — was mislocated to base+12 late under the old NaN-scale gate.

churrito.bin.name: Churrito
churrito.bin.nameVarint: two-byte utf16 length prefix in the decompressed record
churrito.bin.note: Colorless cat (classPalette -1). Corrected locator: coatPalette 35, pattern 112, symmetric slots.

reinaldo.bin.name: Reinaldo
reinaldo.bin.note: Rich Mage cat — the L/R-symmetry golden: Eye_L==Eye_R (166), Ear_L==Ear_R (129), Brow_L==Brow_R (207), symmetric legs (26). classPalette 55 == MageCat accent (custom_cats.gon). Location unchanged by the 01-06 fix (was already correct). Extracted READ-ONLY from steamcampaign02.sav.

save_file_cat.bin.name: Lucina
save_file_cat.bin.note: Already-decompressed self-describing record (u32@0==19): decoded directly without LZ4. Stats + appearance decode (coatPalette 47), but buildOk is false (no known build word at offset 4 — that is the uid), so appearanceVerified stays false: genes decode for reference but the record never claims a verified portrait. MUTATIONS: 9 regions decode from the >=300 part-frames + pattern (411, Fur) — RearLeg 181 is a base part (no rear-Legs mutation); the common 400-band parts have no in-game name so list their stat effect. L/R pairs (Eyes/Brows/Ears) dedupe to one entry each.
